Uses of Class
at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom.Variable

  • Packages that use Variable 
    Package Description
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo
    This package contains the classes of the rule based system AntiUnifySystem, the corresponding problem definition AntiUnifyProblem and some standard implementations of a rigidity function (RigidityFncSubsequence, RigidityFncSubstring ).
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data
    This package contains the classes which are needed to build up the term tree.
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom
    This package contains all the atomic types like Function, TermVar, HedgeVar.

    • Uses of Variable in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo

      Fields in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo declared as Variable 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      Variable AntiUnifyProblem.generalizationVar 
      Methods in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo that return types with arguments of type Variable 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Map<Variable,TermNode> Substitution.getMapping() 
      Methods in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo with parameters of type Variable 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void AntiUnify.callback(AntiUnifySystem result, Variable generalizationVar)
      This callback function will be invoked for every found generalization.
      void Substitution.composeInRange(Variable fromVar, TermNode toTerm)
      Substitution composition which does not add new variables to the mapping.
      TermNode Substitution.get(Variable var)
      Returns the associated TermNode for a given Variable or null if no mapping exists.
      void Substitution.put(Variable fromVar, TermNode toTerm)
      Add a new mapping of the form: Variable -> Term
      Constructors in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo with parameters of type Variable 
      Constructor and Description
      AntiUnifyProblem(Variable generalizationVar, TermNode left, TermNode right)
      Create an AUP with the given generalization variable and hedges.

    • Uses of Variable in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data

      Methods in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data with parameters of type Variable 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Hedge Hedge.substitute(Variable x, TermNode t) 
      TermNode TermNode.substitute(Variable from, TermNode to)
      Substitutes one Variable by a TermNode recursively and returns the new TermNode.
      Method parameters in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data with type arguments of type Variable 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Hedge Hedge.apply(Map<Variable,TermNode> sigma) 
      TermNode TermNode.apply(Map<Variable,TermNode> sigma)
      Applies a substitution recursively and returns the new TermNode.

    • Uses of Variable in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom

      Subclasses of Variable in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  HedgeVar
      A hedge variable can be substituted by a single TermNode or a hedge which is represented by a TermNode with a null-atom TermNode.isNullAtom().
      class  TermVar
      A simple term variable can be substituted by a single TermNode.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
